LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T51_Power_Armor_Helm: Mal en T51 power panserhjelm i Brotherhood Appalachia kapittelfarger.
Maling T51 hjelm i Appalachia farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_Appalachia_T60_Power_Armor_Helm: Mal en T60 power panserhjelm i Brotherhood Appalachia kapittelfarger.
Maling T60 hjelm i Appalachia farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor_Helmet.de: Mal en T45 power panserhjelm i Lyons Pride Remnants-farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T45_Lyons_Power_Armor_Helmet.jo: Maling T45 hjelm i Lyons Pride farger.
Mal en T45 power panserhjelm i Brotherhood Outcast-farger.
Maling T45 hjelm i Outcast farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.descript: Mal en T51 power armor-hjelm i standard Brotherhood of Steel-farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.jobStrin: Maling T51 hjelm i BoS farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T51_Power_Armor_Helmet.label: paint T51 hjelm (BoS standard)
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.descript: Mal en T60 power armor-hjelm i standard Brotherhood of Steel-farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.jobStrin: Maling T60 hjelm i BoS farger.
LanguageData.Make_BoS_T60_Power_Armor_Helmet.label: paint T60 hjelm (BoS standard)
